body:
## Summary
- Replay the full route prompt for resumed `fix-pr` runs when `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT` is present.
- Keep direct/manual `fix-pr` continuation behavior unchanged.
- Add regression coverage for agent-facing prompt selection and document the session-continuity behavior.

## Tests
- `npm --prefix .agent test`
- `npm --prefix .agent run build && node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/prompt-continuation.test.js`

Closes #84

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 5 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Read docs and linked context first | pass | 6/6 | PR closes #84 and implements its stated acceptance criteria for resumed orchestrated `fix-pr` context, including preserving direct/manual behavior. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 7/7 | Updates `.agent/docs/technical-details/session-continuity.md` to document full-prompt replay for resumed orchestrator-launched `fix-pr` runs. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 8/8 | Keeps prompt selection integrated with existing `selectPromptForSessionOutcome`; new helper only extracts continuation-prompt construction/selection logic from `run.ts`. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 8/8 | Diff is limited to runtime prompt selection, one helper, focused tests, and one docs bullet. No unrelated workflow or orchestration refactor. |
| coding_style / generic | Prefer simple implementations | pass | 7/7 | Uses a direct predicate: replay full prompt only when `route === "fix-pr"` and `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT` is non-empty. |

## Notes

- The strongest rubric alignment is that the PR fixes the precise #84 failure mode without broadening orchestration behavior: resumed orchestrated `fix-pr` gets the full route prompt, while direct `fix-pr` and non-`fix-pr` routes keep lightweight continuation prompts.
- The regression tests cover the important contract points: full prompt for orchestrated resumed `fix-pr`, continuation prompt for direct `fix-pr`, and unchanged behavior for other routes.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric violations found.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #89 fixes #84, where resumed orchestrator-launched `fix-pr` runs could lose the current handoff instructions.
- The change makes resumed `fix-pr` runs with non-empty `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT` replay the full route prompt instead of the lightweight continuation prompt.
- Direct/manual `fix-pr` continuation behavior remains unchanged when no orchestrator context is present.
- The PR adds focused regression coverage and updates the session-continuity docs.

## Review
The independent reviews agree the PR is focused, correct, and aligned with #84’s acceptance criteria. One reviewer noted optional follow-up improvements around log naming and future template-render coverage, but no reviewer identified required branch changes.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No actionable findings | INFO | No blocking or required warning-level branch changes remain. Optional follow-ups were noted but are not necessary for this PR to ship. |

## Progress
- Rubrics review passed with no violations.
- Existing PR discussion already includes a rubrics PASS comment.
- Existing inline review comments were checked; none were present.
- #79 remains intentionally out of scope; this PR addresses #84’s context-delivery root cause.
- CI check is passing on the PR.

## Recommended Next Step
`NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION`: no unresolved actionable branch work remains, and the remaining reviewer notes are optional follow-up considerations.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change action items.

> Replay the full route prompt for resumed fix-pr runs when ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT is present.

@sepo-agent /answer 

Wait, so after this update, for fix-pr, it will 
- keep the session continuation behavior 
- and for each step, it will add the whole fix-pr prompt again?

Mostly yes on session continuity, but **no** if “add” means append/duplicate the whole prompt at every internal step.

After this PR:

- `fix-pr` still keeps the existing `resume-best-effort` session behavior.
- For a **resumed `fix-pr` run with non-empty `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT`**, it skips the lightweight continuation prompt, so ACP receives the **full current `fix-pr` route prompt once for that run**.
- It does **not** repeatedly inject the full prompt into every model step/turn.
- It does **not** concatenate the full prompt onto the prior transcript; the prior session context is resumed separately by the session backend.
- Direct/manual `fix-pr` runs without `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT` still use the lightweight continuation prompt.
- Non-`fix-pr` routes are unchanged.

The key predicate is in [`shouldReplayFullPromptOnResume`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/agent/implement-issue-84/codex-25260959858/.agent/src/prompt-continuation.ts): only `route === "fix-pr"` plus non-empty `ORCHESTRATOR_CONTEXT` flips resumed runs back to the full prompt. The docs update states the same behavior in [`session-continuity.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/agent/implement-issue-84/codex-25260959858/.agent/docs/technical-details/session-continuity.md).

## Rubrics Update

No changes were committed to [`agent/rubrics`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/tree/agent/rubrics) from PR #89.

no rubric changes

I read PR #89 history, linked issue #84, PR comments/reviews, collaborator/owner context, diff, and existing rubrics. The only human PR comment was a clarification question from `lolipopshock`; it did not establish a reusable implementation/review preference. The remaining discussion was bot/agent-authored or project-specific behavior already covered by existing rubrics like `keep-docs-in-sync`, `read-docs-first`, `reuse-existing-code`, and `surgical-changes`.

I left `/agent-rubrics` unchanged.

title: Preserve resumed fix-pr handoff context
